since_last: 51% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.86%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.65% · Gold -0.17% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 51% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.86%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.86%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +5.11%, BABA +4.97%, SMR +3.50%, MDB +3.27%, TER +3.08%. Laggards: ORCL -3.96%, DELL -3.39%, KLAC -3.17%, HPE -3.10%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.98% at $120.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
